chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Saleem Jessar Mr. Justice Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro Constitution Petition No. D-894 of 2026 (Elahi Bux v. Province of Sindh through Secretary Home Department and others) Petitioner Elahi Bux: Through Mr. Muhammad Iqrar, Advocate Respondents Province of Sindh through Home Department and others: Through M/s. Hakim Ali Shaikh and Sageer Ahmed Abbasi, Additional Advocates General, Sindh and Mr. Faheem Hussain, Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh alongwith SIP Shahid Mustafa, Crime Investigation Sindh, PI Ghazanfar Ali on behalf of Addl: I.G.P, Karachi Range and SIP Deedar Hussain, P.S Mochko Date of hearing and order: 18.03.2026 ORDER Muhammad Saleem Jessar, J:- Through this petition, petitioner seeks removal of his name from CRO entered with police station Mochko, District West, Karachi pursuant to FIR No.356 of 2020 recorded under Section 23(a) of Sindh Arms Act, 2013. 2. It is the case of the petitioner that the petitioner faced trial and was acquitted by the Trial Court vide judgment dated 14.01.2021 therefore maintaining his name in CRO stained career of the petitioner. 3. On notice, Respondent Nos.5 and 6 have filed their replies and contended that pursuant to the acquittal judgment CRO has been Const.Petition No.D-894/2026 -2- updated and entry of acquittal has been recorded in the police station record. When confronted, learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and seeks disposal of this petition in terms of the statement filed by the respondent. Order accordingly. 4. The petition stands disposed of. Respondents are directed to maintain the updated record of the petitioner in the relevant register(s).
The petition stands disposed of. Respondents are directed to maintain the updated record of the petitioner in the relevant register(s). JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
